overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a grand Gothic great hall filled with diners at long wooden tables, illuminated by hundreds of floating candles and chandeliers. The camera slowly pans across the stone interior, showcasing stained glass windows and medieval architecture reminiscent of a magical dining hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with long dining tables and floating candle chandeliers

agents.ego_description: slowly panning across the great hall, observing the diners and architecture from an elevated position

notable_agents.action: diners seated at long tables eating and conversing
figure standing near the fireplace on the right side

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles and chandeliers suspended from the high ceiling providing warm illumination
rows of long wooden dining tables laden with food and plates, filled with diners
tall Gothic stained glass windows showing dark blue night sky outside
large stone fireplace with burning fire on the right wall
decorative tapestries and banners hanging on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: A cinematic slow pan across a grand Gothic great hall filled with diners seated at long wooden tables. Hundreds of floating candles illuminate the stone interior from above, while stained glass windows reveal the night outside. The camera observes the scene from an elevated position, capturing the warm glow of the fireplace and the medieval tapestries adorning the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous, elevated pan across a grand Gothic great hall, capturing the atmospheric transition from the shadowed stone architecture to the warm, flickering light of a magical feast. It begins by sweeping over the vast interior, where diners are seated at long wooden tables beneath a canopy of hundreds of floating candles. As the camera glides forward, the view shifts to reveal the deep colors of stained glass windows contrasting with the dark night outside. The scene then expands to encompass the rich textures of medieval tapestries adorning the walls before finally turning toward the golden, inviting glow of a large fireplace.
